title: poa fluitans
intro: Poa fluitans, also known as floating meadow-grass or water meadow-grass, is a type of grass that grows in aquatic environments. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Poa fluitans include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Poa fluitans can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported ability to treat wounds and skin conditions.
